//: Refresh config in-game using `/open-in-inventory refresh` command
//screen_blacklist: Class name of screen in which this mod will be disabled
//require_empty_main_hand: Disable open-in-inventory when player is holding something in main hand
//require_single_stack: Prevent open-in-inventory from applying to item stacks containing more than one item
//open_delay: delay (in tick) from swapping item to main hand to use such item
//enabled_items: format: ItemID, or { id: ItemID, Count?: integer, nbt?: NbtCompound, sneak?: boolean }, ? means optional
ItemID is a string, for example `example_mod:bag`. You can use template to support multiple items at once, for example `example:{color}_bag`
Use `/open-in-inventory replaceTemplate ...` command to view valid templates
